benefits.description: Seeking relief from food noise 24/7 and binge eating disorder

protocol_notes: First-time peptide user. Ordering 5mg vial from Polish vendor (~$135/500zł). Plans to reconstitute with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Concerned about storage as cannot use fridge (hiding from fiancé). Garage in Poland winter (~8°C) considered as storage. Thyroid medication dose was previously self-increased to 5x prescribed, leading to iatrogenic hyperthyroidism; dose has since been corrected. In therapy for BED. Has important events in January (wedding, holiday trip). Not yet started — post is pre-use planning.
